Volume — Last 12 Workouts
Muscle Split (sets)
Progressive Overload THIS WEEK vs LAST
Based on total volume load (sets × reps × weight). Research suggests 5–10% weekly increase is optimal.
Weekly Tonnage LBS LIFTED
Total volume load per week. An upward trend = progressive overload is happening.
Est. 1 Rep Max EPLEY FORMULA
Calculated as: weight × (1 + reps / 30). Shows your best set ever per exercise.
